mapper.select: SELECT s.shipment_id, s.po_id, po.po_code, s.shipment_order_id, so.shipment_order_code, s.shipment_status FROM shipments s JOIN purchase_orders po ON s.po_id = po.po_id LEFT JOIN shipment_orders so ON s.shipment_order_id = so.shipment_order_id WHERE s.shipment_id = #{shipmentId}

SELECT s.shipment_id, s.po_id, po.po_code, s.shipment_order_id, so.shipment_order_code, s.shipment_status FROM shipments s JOIN purchase_orders po ON s.po_id = po.po_id LEFT JOIN shipment_orders so ON s.shipment_order_id = so.shipment_order_id

SELECT s.shipment_id, s.po_id, po.po_code, s.shipment_order_id, so.shipment_order_code, s.shipment_status FROM shipments s JOIN purchase_orders po ON s.po_id = po.po_id LEFT JOIN shipment_orders so ON s.shipment_order_id = so.shipment_order_id WHERE po.po_code = #{poId}
